series_metadata.series_title: Bureau of Infectious Diseases: Outbreak Line Lists
series_metadata.series_description: Line lists created for administrative purposes during active public health investigations of outbreaks reported to the Ohio Department of Health's Bureau of Infectious Diseases under 3701-3-02(C).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Data in electronic database ODRS is retained superseded. Hardcopy/paper and Electronic documents- no longer of administrative value (e.g., outbreak has been closed and any applicable outbreak report is completed) ; Electronic: Data in electronic database ODRS is retained superseded. Hardcopy/paper and Electronic documents- no longer of administrative value (e.g., outbreak has been closed and any applicable outbreak report is completed)
